codeReview.summary: The README-only change covers the required x.ai OAuth documentation: it documents the actual --xai-oauth-login flag, helper flags --no-browser and --oauth-callback-port, post-login local proxy usage, the xai-oauth provider/channel, oauth-model-alias and oauth-excluded-models configuration, and a grok-4.3 model example. The wording explicitly distinguishes x.ai OAuth from upstream API-key configuration, matching VAL-DOCS-001 and VAL-DOCS-002.

No blocking or non-blocking issues were found.
